title: KNAS Posts Training Induction Program for TVET Instructors
description: The Kinoguitan National Agricultural School (KNAS) launched a Training Induction Program (TIP) for students enrolled in the Trainer's Methodology Level I (TM I) course under the Training for Work Scholarship Program. The orientation aimed to synchronize expectations between the institution and trainees providing a roadmap for transitioning skilled practitioners into certified TVET instructors and assessors. Key topics included an overview of competency-based learning, training session delivery, instructional material development, and the rigorous TESDA-mandated protocols required for course completion. Led by Vocational School Administrator II Melody V. Acenas, the event featured faculty presentations and a collaborative Q&A session to reinforce the school’s mission of providing high-quality vocational education in the agricultural and technical fields February 26, 2026.
